name: Equinox Gold Corp.
description: Equinox Gold Corp. is a Canadian mid-tier gold producer headquartered in Vancouver with eight producing mines across the Americas, including the Valentine Gold Mine in Newfoundland & Labrador, operations in Brazil (Aurizona, Fazenda, Santa Luz, RDM), Mexico (Los Filos), and the United States (Mesquite, Castle Mountain). The company achieved commercial production at its flagship Valentine Mine in late 2025, targeting 150,000–200,000 ounces of gold annually from that operation alone. Equinox Gold is a growth-focused producer aiming to expand output through its existing asset base and continued development across its multi-jurisdiction portfolio.
